title: LinkedIn Lead Scraper Input
description: Configure your LinkedIn lead generation search

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: List of search queries to find leads. Each query targets a specific need (e.g. 'IT manager cloud backup', 'CTO managed IT services').
default: IT director MDR managed detection response

profileType.title: Profile Type
profileType.description: Search for individual profiles (people) or company pages.

location.title: Location Filter
location.description: Optionally restrict results to a city, state, or country (e.g. 'Chicago', 'Texas', 'United States').

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max Results Per Query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of leads to collect per search query. Higher values consume more credits.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings to avoid rate limiting. Datacenter proxies are recommended.
